subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Most Exalted Pen hath testified that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who hath appeared is, verily, His Own Self and Essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه شهد القلم الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لنفسه و ذاته و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
